title: Post-Quantum Cryptography Initiatives
description: CyberSecurity Malaysia's overview page describing its PQC strategy, PQC Migration Framework, algorithm research, encryption standards (MySEAL), and quantum-safe migration services.

title: Post-quantum Cryptography Migration Framework (PDF)
description: CyberSecurity Malaysia (MyKripto) PQC Migration Framework document providing a structured pathway to transition organisations from classical cryptography to quantum-safe alternatives.

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography Initiatives - Documents (MyKripto)
description: MyKripto documents listing for PQC, including the PQC Migration Framework and the technical guide 'Recommendations for the Adoption and Implementation of Post-Quantum Cryptographic Solutions'.

title: PQC Services (MyKripto - CyberSecurity Malaysia)
description: CyberSecurity Malaysia PQC service offerings: migration consultations, awareness sessions and technical workshops for transition to quantum-safe cryptography.

title: PQC Activities (MyKripto - CyberSecurity Malaysia)
description: MyKripto page describing CyberSecurity Malaysia's PQC-related activities, research and awareness work.

title: post-quantum cryptography initiatives - FAQ (MyKripto)
description: MyKripto FAQ on CyberSecurity Malaysia's post-quantum cryptography initiatives.

title: MyKriptografi - National Cryptography Policy
description: NACSA page on MyKriptografi, the National Cryptography Policy approved by Cabinet 28 Nov 2025; references threats of the 'quantum computing era' but does not explicitly name PQC/post-quantum cryptography.

title: MYNIC's Preparing For Tomorrow's Threat: The Impact Of Quantum Computing On Internet Security
description: Ministry of Digital announcement on MYNIC and quantum computing's impact on internet security (DNSSEC). Could not verify explicit PQC reference (page fetch failed on certificate).

title: Malaysia launches national plan and sandbox for post-quantum cryptography
description: News (The Sun) on the November 2025 launch of the National PQC Migration Plan 2025-2030 and PQC Sandbox PoC Programme by NACSA/Ministry of Digital. Non-institutional (journalism).

title: Navigating National Cyber Resilience in the Quantum Era (NACSA conference slides)
description: Conference presentation by NACSA chief executive Megat Zuhairy on Malaysia's national PQC readiness, hosted on the PKI Consortium (non-domestic) site.

title: Quantum-Safe Cryptography and the Future of Malaysia's Cybersecurity Strategy
description: Academic paper on ResearchGate analysing Malaysia's quantum-safe strategy. Academic, not institutional.

title: Quantum-safe encryption emerges as new standard
description: The Star news article on quantum-safe encryption in Malaysia. Journalism, not institutional.

title: ICE-PQC 2025 - Universiti Putra Malaysia
description: International Conference and Exhibition on Post-Quantum Cryptography 2025, hosted by Universiti Putra Malaysia. University, not a government/standards institution.
